question: Which country is the only nation in the world that is simultaneously located in all four hemispheres (Northern, Southern, Eastern, and Western)?
fun_fact: Kiribati spans the equator and the 180th meridian, making it the only country to touch all four hemispheres. Because it spans such a wide area of the Pacific, it also stretches across the International Date Line, forcing the government to shift the line eastward in 1995 so that the entire nation could observe the same calendar day.
